## LibraryRuntime.Internal.IVersionScaleOptions.minimumAmount property

Minimum amount to show in scaled filling recipe (default: 0.1) Amounts below this threshold will be rounded up to it

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly minimumAmount?: Measurement;
```
